$note: The Architect's per-workspace config for CC Manager UI. YOUR files are this one + your-checks/ — a core update never touches them. Run: `npx -y connections-arkitect` from the repo root (or `arkitect_run` via the Connections MCP). Outputs land in tmp/arkitect/; each run is archived under .arkitect/reports/ (gitignored).

scan.$reason: misc/ is Windows launcher tooling + brand assets (icons, .lnk); web/src/components/ui is the generated shadcn-vue kit synced from lunarwerx-ui (biome lint is disabled there for the same reason) — neither is hand-written app code worth scanning.

tsconfig-conformance.$reason: compilerOptions.types legitimately differs per project: server/ is Bun (types:['bun']) while web/ is a Vite SPA — not drift.

bundle-weight-budget.$reason: Gate the built SPA's chunk sizes. The largest current chunk (index-*.js) is ~430KB; warn well above that with headroom for the app to grow before it's worth code-splitting, but still catch a real regression (an accidentally-bundled dependency, a lost lazy-load).
